name: com.unity.ide.antigravity
description: Antigravity editor integration for supporting Google Antigravity as code editor for Unity. Adds support for generating csproj files for intellisense purposes, auto discovery of installations, etc.

_upm.changelog:
Integration:

- Workspace config (.vscode/) auto-generated for Antigravity
- Extensions looked up from ~/.antigravity/extensions
- Fixed uninitialized variable on unsupported platforms
- Removed orphaned Cursor/Codium meta files
